# ✨ Feature Overview

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

---

# 🚀 Open Source Program

- [ ] ECSOC 2026
- [ ] ELUSOC 2026
- [ ] General Contribution

> If this feature request is part of an open-source program, please add the corresponding label:
>
> - `ECSOC2026`
> - `ELUSOC2026`

---

# ❓ Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem clearly.

Example:

> "I'm always frustrated when..."

---

# 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

Include as much detail as possible.

---

# 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

---

# 🎯 Benefits

How will this feature improve the project?

Examples:

- Better user experience
- Improved performance
- Easier maintenance
- New gameplay functionality
- Better developer experience

---

# 📸 Mockups / Screenshots (Optional)

Attach screenshots, wireframes, UI mockups, or diagrams if they help explain the feature.

---

# 📋 Additional Context

Add any additional information, references, links, or implementation ideas that may help the maintainers evaluate the proposal.
